description: Lists properties and responses of hybrid bolt elements in the range. If no keyword is given, the default output of the command is that associated with the information keyword.

keywords.name: apply
keywords.description: axial tension that will be maintained during cycling

keywords.name: dowel
keywords.description: list of dowels associated with each element in the range

keywords.name: force-axial
keywords.description: axial force in the bolt (average of the two end forces)

keywords.name: force-node-global
keywords.description: generalized nodal forces (force and moment) acting on the element. These are the generalized forces exerted by the nodes on the element. express the values in the element coordinate system (the default) express the values in the global coordinate system

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: group assignment(s). If slot is specified, then list the group assignment, if any, in slot s .

keywords.name: grout
keywords.description: information about the grout that is modeled as coupling springs that connect the bolt to the target object (zones in FLAC3D and 3DEC, and particles in PFC3D): confinement, displacement, stress, yield state and average axial direction

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: general element information: nodal connectivity, centroid, surface area, volume, and hide/select status

keywords.name: property-young-dowel-yield
keywords.description: cross-sectional area mass density grout cohesion (force units) per unit length grout friction angle grout exposed perimeter grout stiffness per unit length large-strain sliding flag large-strain sliding tolerance tensile failure strain thermal-expansion coefficient compressive yield strength tensile yield strength Young’s modulus Active length of dowel segments [L] Dowel shear strain limit [-] Dowel shear stiffness [F/L] Dowel shear yield strength [F]

keywords.name: stress
keywords.description: axial stress in the hybrid bolt element (not to be confused with stress in the grout)

keywords.name: yield
keywords.description: yield state indicating whether or not the hybrid bolt element has yielded
